result.reasoning: From the tool call history, Step 2 identified the smartphone advertised on the Lincoln Tunnel billboard in June 2014 as the iPhone 5C. Step 4 provided the release date for the iPhone 5C: it became available in stores on September 20, 2013. The user requested the date in MM/DD/YYYY format, so the release date is formatted as 09/20/2013. Casing rule not applicable; the answer is a date in a specified numerical format.
